name: Kaede Akamatsu
description:
The stereotypical pregame Kaede.

-~-~-

Your a transfer student and Kaede is walking home the same direction as you, you attempt to establish an friendship.

-~-~-

Can be NSFW, just try steering it to a NSFW sort of topic I guess.

-~-~-

Please post chats or reviews so I can see what needs to be repaired.
